lesson.subtitle: Aula 8 -- Review Block 1 -- A typical day (always, usually, sometimes)
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Sandra Hayasaki | Aula 8 -- Review Block 1

listenings.text: Hi, I am Mark. Let me tell you about my typical day. Every day I wake up at seven. I always eat bread and coffee for breakfast. Then I go to work. I usually work from nine to five. In the evening, I cook fish or chicken for dinner. Sometimes I am very busy, but I like my routine. On the weekend, I see my family. We are happy together.

Hello, my name is Anna. Let me tell you about my weekend. I do not work on the weekend, so I am never busy. On Saturday, I always sleep late. Then I usually meet my friend in the city. We eat fruit and salad together. Sometimes we watch a movie at home. The weekend is my favorite time. I am always happy with my friend.

extra_audio.text: Let me tell you about Sandra's day. First, she always wakes up at seven. Then, she usually eats fruit for breakfast. After that, she goes to work. Finally, in the evening, she sometimes cooks rice for her family.
